FEATURES.INTRO: It is easy to get lost in the world of the valley mist when the sun shines on a freshly detailed car. Buy premium car care products online – from NG-4IN interior coatings to NG-14 nano graphene.

PRO_LINE.TITLE: Liquid Light PRO Line
PRO_LINE.DESC: Liquid Light PRO Line includes highly advanced car care products specifically developed for professional detailers and enthusiasts.

INFO.TITLE:
NG-14 NANO GRAPHENE
Coating.
BULLETS: Special polymer from an American compound (DIN-1048)
Resistant to UV, rust, wear, friction & bacteria
INFO.SUBTITLE: One of the best realistic paints in the world
INFO.DESC: The NG-14 Application is the 2020 product line of Liquid Light. It is an ultra-transparent nano-hybrid coating characterized by superior 14H hardness with the highest levels of protection. It penetrates capillary pores using Nano-Graphene technology, providing an amazing diamond shine and self-healing properties.

CMO_V2.DISCLAIMER: * 24 Months Normal / 6 Months Heavy | ** pH1 – pH12

INFO.TITLE:
NG-4IN INTERIOR
Coating.
BULLETS: Natural factory sheen without excessive shine
Eliminates bacteria, odors, and relieves nervous tension
Activates Dopamine Response and promotes alertness
INFO.SUBTITLE: A real physiological and psychological effect
INFO.DESC: The NG-4IN Application is the 2025 product line of Liquid Light. It is a single-pack, transparent nano-hybrid coating and fragrance compound that penetrates through capillary pores using Nanogram technology. It offers protection against dust, UV rays, bacteria, and fungi while providing a strong, refreshing scent.

WHY_PROTECT.TITLE: WHY PROTECT THE VEHICLE?
WHY_PROTECT.DESC: Liquid Light coatings reduce chemical reactions from contaminants, which are exacerbated by heat and UV radiation and can otherwise lead to etching, water spots, and stains. The nanoparticles act as heat shields, creating high mechanical strength and thermal stability.

WHY_NANO.TITLE: WHY NANOTECHNOLOGY?
WHY_NANO.DESC: Nanocoatings are scientifically engineered with nanoparticles that bond to the surfaces they are applied to, forming a protective layer that increases the durability of the surface.

EXCEPTIONAL.TITLE: Exceptional Material.
EXCEPTIONAL.DESC: Liquid Light has produced something novel, it's called NG-14 - NANO GRAPHENE COATING

BIO.TEXT:
Pharaohs International Group is a leading force in integrated advertising solutions, marketing consultation, and specialized engineering services across Egypt and the Middle East.

With decades of industry expertise, we empower brands to realize their vision through state-of-the-art printing technologies, large-scale event management, and innovative promotional strategies. We pride ourselves on delivering uncompromising quality, strategic insights, and end-to-end solutions that drive tangible business growth.

ITEMS.name: Marketing Consultants
ITEMS.description: Providing data-driven strategic guidance, brand positioning, and comprehensive event creation to elevate your market presence and engage your target audience effectively.

ITEMS.name: Advertising & Printing
ITEMS.description: Delivering world-class digital, offset, and large-format printing. From bespoke promotional materials and signage to complete corporate branding packages.

ITEMS.name: Marketing Research
ITEMS.description: Conducting in-depth market analysis, matchmaking sessions, and competitive intelligence to help businesses successfully navigate and expand into new markets.

ITEMS.name: Trade Fairs & Conferences
ITEMS.description: Expert end-to-end management of large-scale trade fairs, corporate conferences, and festivals, complete with custom stand fabrication and logistical support.

ITEMS.name: Hotels & Resorts Supply
ITEMS.description: Serving as trusted general suppliers for the hospitality sector, providing premium operational materials, uniforms, and specialized equipment for hotels and resorts.

ITEMS.name: Imports & Exports
ITEMS.description: Facilitating seamless international trade with rigorous quality control, connecting local markets with global suppliers to ensure a reliable supply chain.

ITEMS.name: Construction & Epoxy
ITEMS.description: Executing specialized engineering constructions and decorative finishes, featuring cutting-edge luminous epoxies and light-retaining paint technologies.

LIQUID_LIGHT.TITLE: Discover Liquid Light
LIQUID_LIGHT.DESC: The next generation of Nano Graphene Coating. Uncompromising protection, ultimate gloss, and advanced automotive care technology.
